verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Keep conflicting codes out of active unless official evidence or at least two credible current sources clearly support restoration.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Official page says to join the community server for exclusive reward codes, but it does not list the live code strings.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Discord and Trello guide
sources.notes: Maps the official Discord invite and Trello board. Article says the Discord has a codes-list channel and the Trello board has an active codes column.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 17, 2026. Lists the same 11 active codes kept in codes.json and provides matching level gates.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 13, 2026. Matches the 11-code active set and is the cleanest source for the current minimum level requirements.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 13, 2026. Matches the retained 11-code active set and the reward bundles kept in codes.json.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 18, 2026. Matches the main 11-code active set but still lists ANTIMAGICUPDATE as active, creating a single-code conflict.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 16, 2026. Keeps many older codes active, including 2XLUCK and CRYSTALDEFENSE, so it was treated as an overinclusive conflict source rather than restoration proof.
